items.a: Black tie and traditional. Floor-length gowns, agbada, gele, dinner jackets. The house palette is ivory, emerald, oxblood, and gold — but please wear what makes you feel beautiful.
We have chosen an adults-only celebration, with the warm exception of those named on your invitation. A list of trusted babysitters will be sent on request.
Doors open at 10:00 for the engagement; the white wedding begins promptly at 16:00. We recommend arriving thirty minutes before each ceremony.
Yes — valet from 09:00 at the venue. A complimentary shuttle will run to the chapel from 09:30.

items.q: Can I take photographs during the ceremony?
items.a: We kindly ask that phones and cameras be kept away during both ceremonies. A full gallery will be shared with all guests within four weeks.
Your presence is gift enough. For those who have asked, please see our Blessings page — small contributions toward our first home.
Standard, vegetarian, kosher, and halal options will be available on the day. Do let our chief bridesmaid know of any allergies in advance.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Our chief bridesmaid Folasade can be reached at folasade@etomotosho.com for all matters of the day.
